description.en: 'rb' for reading and 'wb' for writing. Changed in version 3.13: In previous versions it was an integer 1 or 2.

excerpt.es: 'rb' for reading and 'wb' for writing. Changed in version 3.13: In previous versions it was an integer 1 or 2.
excerpt.en: 'rb' for reading and 'wb' for writing. Changed in version 3.13: In previous versions it was an integer 1 or 2.

description.en: When decompressing, this attribute is set to the last timestamp in the most recently read header. It is an integer, holding the number of seconds since the Unix epoch (00:00:00 UTC, January 1, 1970). The initial value before reading any headers is None.

excerpt.es: When decompressing, this attribute is set to the last timestamp in the most recently read header. It is an integer, holding the number of seconds since the Unix epoch (00:00:00 UTC, January 1, 1970). ...
